file_summary: This file implements the core Serializer class for the itsdangerous library, which provides a secure way to serialize and sign data (typically for creating signed tokens/cookies). The class handles multiple serialization formats (text/bytes), manages cryptographic signing with fallback support for key rotation, and provides safe loading methods with proper signature validation. It includes type hints, overloads for different serializer types, and methods for serialization/deserialization with integrated signing.

line_windows.summary: Imports, type variable definitions, protocol for serializers, and type guard for text serializers.
Continuation of class docstring, class attributes (default_serializer, default_signer, default_fallback_signers), and first __init__ overload for text serializer.
Overloads for __init__ with bytes serializer (positional and keyword) and fallback overloads for generic serializer type.
Implementation of __init__ method, setting instance attributes (secret_keys, salt, serializer, signer, etc.), and beginning of load_payload method.

Contains methods for loading/dumping payloads, creating signers, iterating unsigners, and serializing objects with signing. Key methods: load_payload, dump_payload, make_signer, iter_unsigners, dumps.
Continues iter_unsigners implementation and includes serialization methods: dumps, dump, loads, load, loads_unsafe. Shows signing/unsigning workflow and file I/O wrappers.
Implements unsafe loading methods: _loads_unsafe_impl and load_unsafe. Handles cases where signature validation fails but payload can still be extracted, with safety warnings.

dependencies_or_calls: typing (overload, Any, Optional, Union, TypeVar, Protocol, overload, TYPE_CHECKING)
